Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.core
  2. Cursor

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.redis.core.Cursor

Packages that use Cursor
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection
Connection package providing low-level abstractions for interacting with the various Redis 'drivers'/libraries.
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.jedis
Connection package for Jedis library.
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.lettuce
Connection package for Lettuce Redis client.
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.support.collections
Package providing implementations for most of the java.util collections on top of Redis.

  • Uses of Cursor in org.springframework.data.redis.connection

    Methods in org.springframework.data.redis.connection that return Cursor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Cursor<Map.Entry<byte[],byte[]>>
    DefaultedRedisConnection.hScan(byte[] key, ScanOptions options)
    Deprecated.
    in favor of RedisCommandsProvider.hashCommands()}.
    Cursor<Map.Entry<byte[],byte[]>>
    DefaultStringRedisConnection.hScan(byte[] key, ScanOptions options)
     
    Cursor<Map.Entry<String,String>>
    DefaultStringRedisConnection.hScan(String key, ScanOptions options)
     
    Cursor<@NonNull Map.Entry<byte @NonNull [], byte @NonNull []>>
    RedisHashCommands.hScan(byte @NonNull [] key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in hash at key.
    Cursor<Map.Entry<String,String>>
    StringRedisConnection.hScan(@NonNull String key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in hash at key.
    default Cursor<byte[]>
    DefaultedRedisConnection.scan(ScanOptions options)
    Deprecated.
    in favor of RedisCommandsProvider.keyCommands().
    Cursor<byte[]>
    DefaultStringRedisConnection.scan(ScanOptions options)
     
    Cursor<byte @NonNull []>
    RedisClusterConnection.scan(@NonNull RedisClusterNode node, @NonNull ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over keys.
    default Cursor<byte @NonNull []>
    RedisKeyCommands.scan(@NonNull KeyScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over keys.
    Cursor<byte @NonNull []>
    RedisKeyCommands.scan(@Nullable ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over keys.
    default Cursor<byte[]>
    DefaultedRedisConnection.sScan(byte[] key, ScanOptions options)
    Deprecated.
    in favor of RedisCommandsProvider.setCommands()}.
    Cursor<byte[]>
    DefaultStringRedisConnection.sScan(byte[] key, ScanOptions options)
     
    Cursor<String>
    DefaultStringRedisConnection.sScan(String key, ScanOptions options)
     
    Cursor<byte @NonNull []>
    RedisSetCommands.sScan(byte @NonNull [] key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over elements in set at key.
    Cursor<String>
    StringRedisConnection.sScan(@NonNull String key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over elements in set at key.
    default Cursor<Tuple>
    DefaultedRedisConnection.zScan(byte[] key, ScanOptions options)
    Deprecated.
    in favor of RedisCommandsProvider.zSetCommands()}.
    Cursor<Tuple>
    DefaultStringRedisConnection.zScan(byte[] key, ScanOptions options)
     
    Cursor<StringRedisConnection.StringTuple>
    DefaultStringRedisConnection.zScan(String key, ScanOptions options)
     
    Cursor<@NonNull Tuple>
    RedisZSetCommands.zScan(byte @NonNull [] key, @Nullable ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over elements in sorted set at key.
    Cursor<StringRedisConnection.StringTuple>
    StringRedisConnection.zScan(@NonNull String key, ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over elements in sorted set at key.

  • Uses of Cursor in org.springframework.data.redis.core

    Classes in org.springframework.data.redis.core that implement Cursor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ConvertingCursor<S,T>
    ConvertingCursor wraps a given cursor and applies given Converter to items prior to returning them.
    class 
    KeyBoundCursor<T>
     
    class 
    ScanCursor<T>
    Redis client agnostic Cursor implementation continuously loading additional results from Redis server until reaching its starting point zero.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.redis.core that return Cursor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Cursor<Map.Entry<@NonNull HK, HV>>
    BoundHashOperations.scan(@NonNull ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in hash at the bound key.
    Cursor<@NonNull V>
    BoundSetOperations.scan(@NonNull ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in set at key.
    Cursor<@NonNull ZSetOperations.TypedTuple<V>>
    BoundZSetOperations.scan(@NonNull ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in zset at the bound key.
    @NonNull Cursor<Map.Entry<@NonNull HK, HV>>
    HashOperations.scan(@NonNull H key, @Nullable ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries in hash at key.
    @NonNull Cursor<@NonNull K>
    RedisOperations.scan(@NonNull ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over keys.
    Cursor<K>
    RedisTemplate.scan(ScanOptions options)
     
    @NonNull Cursor<@NonNull V>
    SetOperations.scan(@NonNull K key, @NonNull ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries set at key.
    @NonNull Cursor<@NonNull ZSetOperations.TypedTuple<V>>
    ZSetOperations.scan(@NonNull K key, @Nullable ScanOptions options)
    Use a Cursor to iterate over entries zset at key.
